title: Freezing and Unfreezing Unicellular Protists Using Mr Frosty Container
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gg3btyn
materials: Nalgene® Mr. Frosty® Cryo 1°C Freezing Containers
We usually keep it for 24 hours

steps.title: Use growing medium according to your...
steps.instruction: Use growing medium according to your organism, in our case is marine broth. We usually make 10 mL final volume (1mL DMSO into 9mL growing medium).

steps.title: When you see they start thawing...
steps.instruction: When you see they start thawing take them out of the water bath, usually is after 2-3 minutes

steps.title: We usually have 1mL frozen culture,...
steps.instruction: We usually have 1mL frozen culture, transfer this 1 mL into 7 mL fresh growing medium flask
